home.about.title: A garden in
home.about.desc: As a landscape consultant, I help you from creation to maintenance. I teach you the right techniques, the right combinations, and the harmony of flowerbeds. You become the craftsman of your corner of nature.
home.about.feature1.title: ENSP Versailles Graduate
home.about.feature1.desc: Higher School of Landscape Architecture of Versailles

home.about.feature2.desc: Every garden is unique, every piece of advice is tailored to your situation.
home.cta.title: Ready to transform your garden?
home.cta.desc: Book a consulting session and start your journey toward a thriving, ecological garden.

portfolio.label: Selected Works
portfolio.desc: Our portfolio is a testament to the intersection of botanical science and architectural precision. Explore our curated selection of transformed landscapes.
portfolio.project1.label: Residential — 2023
portfolio.project1.title: The Brutalist Grove
portfolio.project2.label: Courtyard
portfolio.project2.title: Stone & Solace
portfolio.project3.label: Ecological
portfolio.project3.title: Wild Perennials
portfolio.project4.label: Estate — 2024
portfolio.project4.title: The Horizon Terrace
portfolio.focus.label: Project Focus
portfolio.focus.title: The Brutalist Grove
portfolio.focus.desc: A conversion of a derelict industrial lot into a private sanctuary. We utilized raw concrete forms to frame high-contrast botanical textures—pairing the softness of ostrich ferns with the rigidity of custom-poured limestone basins.
portfolio.cta.title: Your landscape is an unwritten story.
portfolio.cta.desc: Let us curate the next chapter of your outdoor experience. Bespoke designs tailored to your architectural intent.
contact.label: Book a Consultation
contact.desc: Whether you want to revive your garden, plan a construction project, or evolve toward an ecological sanctuary, personalized consulting will help you achieve your vision.
contact.email.label: Electronic Mail
contact.phone.label: Direct Line
contact.expert.label: Expert Guidance
contact.expert.desc: Passionate landscape gardener helping you craft your natural sanctuary.
contact.form.name: Full Name
contact.form.message.placeholder: Describe your current garden situation and what you'd like to achieve...
contact.form.disclaimer: By submitting, you request a consultation session. Nathalie will respond within 48 hours to schedule your appointment.
contact.process.1.title: Consultation
contact.process.1.desc: A site visit to understand the topography and your specific aesthetic vision.
contact.process.2.title: Conceptualization
contact.process.2.desc: Detailed blueprints and plant palettes curated specifically for your zone.
contact.process.3.title: Execution
contact.process.3.desc: Implementation with rigorous attention to structural integrity and health.
footer.bio: Landscape gardener passionate about helping you create and maintain your ideal garden. ENSP Versailles graduate.
